metadata.description: A power source feeding equipment — utility circuit, UPS, PDU, or generator. The graph ROOT for an estate: hosts depend_on a PowerFeed, so a reverse-topological shutdown walks everything that transitively draws from it. Grounded in DMTF Redfish DCIM (Circuit / PowerDistribution) for the power-distribution model and NUT (Network UPS Tools) for UPS telemetry (NUT is GPL — referenced by name only).

watts.description: Rated real power, W (VA for UPS where applicable).

status.description: Observed feed status — online | on-battery | low-battery | overload | off (maps from NUT ups.status). Drives the UPS shutdown trigger.

battery_charge.description: Battery charge percent for a UPS feed (NUT battery.charge).

runtime_seconds.description: Estimated runtime remaining on battery, seconds (NUT battery.runtime).

adopts.role: power-distribution / circuit rating vocabulary (Redfish DCIM PowerDistribution/Circuit)
UPS telemetry variable namespace (status, battery.charge, battery.runtime) — reference-only: NUT is GPL

aliases.name: Outlet
aliases.note: Redfish DCIM Outlet, for a per-outlet feed
